observation.images.exterior_image.comment: Exterior scene view (over_shoulder_left camera). uint8 HWC; exterior view first by camera-order convention. Downscaled to 256x256 by the sim bridge.

observation.images.wrist_image.comment: Wrist view (Robotiq base_link/wrist_cam, focal 2.8). Native 720x1280, resized to 256x256.

observation.text.comment: Task instruction (default/vague/specific variant chosen at launch).

observation.state.arm_joint_pos.comment: Absolute Panda arm joint positions (RoboLab ProprioceptionObservationCfg arm_joint_pos).

action.arm_joint_pos.comment: Absolute Panda joint position targets (RoboLab DroidJointPositionActionCfg, preserve_order). The native DROID action.

action.gripper.comment: Binary gripper: >0.5 closes (finger_joint -> pi/4), else opens (-> 0). ABSOLUTE (arm is absolute too).

comment: RoboLab (NVIDIA Isaac Lab) DROID env in its native joint-position configuration (env_server.py --control joint_pos / DroidJointPositionActionCfg): Franka Panda (7-DoF) + Robotiq 2F-85, ~15 Hz (sim dt 1/120, decimation 8). Action is 8-DoF: 7 absolute Panda joint targets + binary gripper. The env splits state/action into per-quantity features that 'order' reassembles. Two policy cameras (over_shoulder_left exterior + wrist). No env-side normalization (limits only); normalization is policy-side. Sibling configs are launch-selectable control modes of the same embodiment: joint_vel (droid_joint_vel.json, the official DROID pi0.5 pairing) plus ee_abs / ee_del differential-IK branches (see contracts/experiments/droid.json).
